reviews.review_title: Didn't work or needed hard login.
reviews.review_description: Ergo, I can't tell you what this is, or why the lobster is so panicked.

Prepping for talks can be really nerve wracking, even if it's not your first time. I used this app to help my prepare for my talk at FITC and many more work presentations. 

Highly recommended, makes the actual presentation on the day of a breeze!
